subject: [SECURITY] Suspicious incident submission - INC-22F5E87019
body:
Upstream rejected an incident submission.

Reporter: mallory@example.com
Incident ID: INC-22F5E87019
Severity: high
Reason: Prompt injection detected. Reasons: In text: injection: ignore previous instructions; In log file: injection: ignore previous instructions; In log file: suspicious_log: SYSTEM OVERRIDE

The submission was NOT processed by the LLM. No tools were called on its behalf.
